## Qaid v0.4.1 — Quick-add cleanup

A focused follow-up to v0.4.0's setup quick-fill, based on use.

### Changed

- **Manage quick-add players inline** ([28df3e3](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/28df3e3)) — each saved-player pill on the Setup screen now carries an **×** to forget that one player, and the section header has a **Clear** link to remove them all (with a confirm). Same semantics as the Home "Top Players" strip and the Profile sheet — these delete the underlying profile.
- **Removed recent line-ups** ([28df3e3](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/28df3e3)) — the one-tap recent-roster templates were dropped from quick-fill.
- **Removed shuffle** ([28df3e3](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/28df3e3)) — the team-shuffle button was dropped from quick-fill.

### State shape

No changes. `cardScoreTracker_v1` key and shape are unchanged.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 189/189 passing
- `npm run build` succeeds — prompt-mode service worker, 17-entry Workbox precache
- Quick-add clear-all / remove-one / hidden line-ups / hidden shuffle all verified in a live preview (no console errors)
